title: F5 Zoom
description: This mod allows you to change the zoom distance of the camera in third person mode.
body:
F5 Zoom allows you to change the zoom distance of the camera in third person mode. You can change the maximum and minimum zoom distance in the config file or in the Mod Menu settings gui.

![Example use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c49835effb97ded2a617bb76f68450b621e1395_0.webp)
